TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kahciday, title = Kahciday, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kahciday} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Kahciday == O niyaro' no 'Amis ko Kaheciday, o Paridaw a kasa'etal. Itiya ho, ira ko Raranges, Usod, Kakopa a ngangasawan mafolaw tayni tona Kaheciday a niyaro'. O kaitiraan a ngangan no hatini i, o He-pin-li i Posong. Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Kahciday a niyaro', 351 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 859 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 706 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan , polong han i, 153 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 76%, Bunun 1%, roma 5%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u kaħʦiɬ~ɮaj == o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ko~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u pariɬ~ɮaw a kasaʡətaɾ. itija ħo~u, ira ko~u raraŋəs, o~u~uso~uɬ~ɮ, kako~upa a ŋaŋasawan mafo~uɾaw tajni to~una kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u kaitiraan a ŋaŋan no~u ħatini i, o~u ħə-pin-ɾi i po~uso~uŋ. itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaħʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Kahciday == O niyaro' no 'Amis ko Kaheciday, o Paridaw a kasa'etal. Itiya ho, ira ko Raranges, Usod, Kakopa a ngangasawan mafolaw tayni tona Kaheciday a niyaro'. O kaitiraan a ngangan no hatini i, o He-pin-li i Posong. Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Kahciday a niyaro', 351 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 859 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 706 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan , polong han i, 153 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 76%, Bunun 1%, roma 5%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u kaħʦiɬ~ɮaj == o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ko~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u pariɬ~ɮaw a kasaʡətaɾ. itija ħo~u, ira ko~u raraŋəs, o~u~uso~uɬ~ɮ, kako~upa a ŋaŋasawan mafo~uɾaw tajni to~una kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u kaitiraan a ŋaŋan no~u ħatini i, o~u ħə-pin-ɾi i po~uso~uŋ. itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaħʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
